name: Figma
description: Collaborative interface design tool with real-time multiplayer editing

extraction.notes: Likely endpoint; may be internal. Electron-based auto-updater typically checks /mac/RELEASE.json or /mac/latest.json. The exact URL may differ — check app bundle or network traffic.

changelog.notes: Release notes published on figma.com. May not have machine-readable changelog feed.

notes: Electron-based app with custom updater (not Sparkle). Version check URL uncertain — https://desktop.figma.com/mac/RELEASE.json is suspected but unconfirmed. Download page at /download/desktop/mac provides the latest installer redirect. Freemium model. Auto-updating via built-in Electron updater mechanism.
